label: Fleshmass
description: Generates fleshmass terrain and structures using Perlin noise.

fleshFrequency.label: Flesh frequency
fleshFrequency.description: Perlin noise frequency controlling how densely fleshmass is distributed.

fleshThreshold.label: Flesh threshold
fleshThreshold.description: Noise value above which fleshmass edifices are spawned.

fleshTerrainThreshold.label: Flesh terrain threshold
fleshTerrainThreshold.description: Noise value above which flesh terrain is painted (lower than fleshThreshold).

fleshmassCanReplaceBuildings.label: Fleshmass can replace buildings
fleshmassCanReplaceBuildings.description: When true, fleshmass may overwrite existing non-natural-rock buildings.

fleshmassFalloffRadius.label: Fleshmass falloff radius
fleshmassFalloffRadius.description: When positive, fleshmass intensity fades to zero beyond this distance from the map center. Use -1 for no falloff.

noiseOctaves.label: Noise octaves
noiseOctaves.description: Number of Perlin noise octaves used for fleshmass distribution.

bloodFrequency.label: Blood frequency
bloodFrequency.description: Perlin noise frequency controlling the density of blood filth spawning.

bloodThreshold.label: Blood threshold
bloodThreshold.description: Noise value above which blood filth is spawned.
